entries.title: Media health page.
entries.notes: Capture after installing capell-app/media-library in the isolated demo harness and seeding the data required for this use case.
entries.useCase: An administrator reviews media health status for stale, missing, or incomplete assets.

entries.title: Media health table.
entries.notes: Capture the table inside MediaHealthPage after installing capell-app/media-library in the isolated demo harness and seeding missing-alt, stale, and unused Curator records.
entries.useCase: An administrator scans individual media health rows and remediation state.

entries.title: Curator media field inside a form.
entries.notes: Capture a host Capell form that resolves Capell\Core\Contracts\Media\MediaFieldFactory to CuratorMediaFieldFactory and renders Awcodes CuratorPicker for a media FK column.
entries.useCase: An editor selects media through the Curator field embedded in a Capell form.

entries.title: Migration command output or report.
entries.notes: Run the migration command with a seeded Spatie media fixture, preferably first with --dry-run, and capture the summary table and warning output.
entries.useCase: A developer reviews the Spatie-to-Curator migration report before or after migration.
